name: Orange Zuckinni Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, oil and eggs. Beat until well blended.
2. Add All-bran, orange peel and nuts to the mixture. Stir in flour mixed with baking powder, baking soda and salt.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 6x10x2 inch pan or baking dish.
4. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool completely.
5. In a small mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, butter (or oleo) and orange peel until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until fluffy and spreadable. Add milk sparingly if needed.
7. Cover the top of the cake (still in the pan) with frosting.
